# @platform/contracts-ingestion

External data ingestion contract package for source payload schemas, normalization contracts, and ingestion event envelopes.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/contracts-ingestion
Version: 0.1.0
Component: contracts-ingestion
Type: api
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: integration
Bounded context: external-ingestion-contracts
Owner: team-data
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: contract
Class: active.contract
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-data
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own external source payload contracts and normalized ingestion event envelopes
- Define compatibility expectations for external data ingestion
- Separate ingestion contracts from runtime transport and analytical storage

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not call external source systems
- Does not write to PostgreSQL or ClickHouse
- Does not own product-specific interpretation of ingested data

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Consumed by ingestion adapters and tests
- Used to validate external data before mapping to transactional or analytical packages

### Allowed consumers

adapter
tooling
test
```

### Forbidden consumers

direct-storage
```

## Operational notes

- External data ingestion is a first-class boundary because external source contracts are not controlled by the application
